h1.visual_description: Large, bold, sans-serif font with significant padding above and below. Left-aligned.

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample, but likely smaller bold sans-serif or italicized bold.

visual_matchers.pattern: Table with thin black borders, centered text in numeric columns, left-aligned text in category columns.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Data presentation for regional or categorical statistics.

visual_matchers.pattern: Small, sans-serif italicized or regular text immediately following a table.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Data source attribution and methodology note.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number and author names in the header (e.g., '16 Encinas Franco and Laguna').
